envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Simmer SDK API key — get from simmer.markets/dashboard

envVars.name: TRADING_VENUE
envVars.description: sim | polymarket | kalshi (default: sim for paper trading)

envVars.name: FAD_MIN_NET_EDGE
envVars.description: Required edge after fees and spread, as decimal (default: 0.03)

envVars.name: FAD_SAFETY_MARGIN
envVars.description: Extra cushion above fees+spread, as decimal (default: 0.02)

envVars.name: FAD_MAX_SPREAD_PCT
envVars.description: Skip markets with spread wider than this (default: 0.05)

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Only needed for external-wallet self-custody trading.
